mnemonics.title: Order of Core Functions
mnemonics.content: **I** Prefer **D**onuts **R**ight **R**ight Now. (Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover)

mnemonics.title: Purpose of Profiles
mnemonics.content: **C**urrent vs. **T**arget = **G**ap. (Current Profile vs. Target Profile reveals the Gap for your action plan)
